code: # transfer double to array of floats and back, compare precision: n <- 6 input <- rnorm(n) buf <- raw(n*4) for (i in 1:n) {     pack(buf, 4 * (i - 1), "f", input[i]) }  output <- numeric(n) for (i in 1:n) {     output[i] <- unpack(buf, 4 * (i - 1), "f") } # difference between double and float difference <- output - input print(cbind(input, output, difference)) #>           input     output    difference #> [1,] -0.3872136 -0.3872136 -1.251252e-08 #> [2,] -0.7854327 -0.7854326  1.904251e-08 #> [3,] -1.0567369 -1.0567368  4.009650e-08 #> [4,] -0.7955414 -0.7955414  2.387001e-08 #> [5,] -1.7562754 -1.7562754  1.275035e-08 #> [6,] -0.6905379 -0.6905379  2.689148e-08

title: rdyncall 0.9

title: rdyncall 0.8
text: Reimplement simplified version dynfind(). Add dynport: pcap. Minor documentation update SDL installation Solaris/OpenCSW. Fix ARMv7 Thumb-2 ISA SPARC-v7/v9, x86_64-x64 mips-o32 ABIs.

title: rdyncall 0.7.5
text: CRAN release: 2012-09-12 Add support new ARM ABI armhf (ARM hardfloat), tested Raspberry Pi (armv6) Efika MX Smartbook (armv7). Accept NULL typed pointer arguments. Add support *v (void*) return type signature dyncall(). Add support **c external pointers support strptrarray(). Change dynport containers R namespaces environment objects remove .Internal calls :: operators dynports; dynports unloaded via detach(dynport:<PORTNAME>). Improve finalizer management callbacks. Add backward compatibility R 2.10 legacy Mac OS X 10.4/PowerPC R port. Add dynports: csound, GLUT, glfw, EGL, glpk. Add demos: glpk, gles (partial work).

title: rdyncall 0.7.4
